---
title: "Brand Demo"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme:
      - brand
      - custom.scss
---

## Overview

This presentation is styled using the `_brand.yml` file in this directory.

Edit `$h2-font-size` in `custom.scss` to change the slide heading size.

## A plot

```{r}
#| echo: false
plot(cars)
```

## Done

Re-render with `quarto render index.qmd`, or use the hot-load server to resize headings live.
